title: Athyrium nephrodioides
intro: Athyrium nephrodioides, also known as the nephrolepis fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Athyrium nephrodioides include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often used to prepare infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and gastrointestinal disorders.
